LinkedIn GitHub Email CV

Igor Nunes Patricio is deeply interested in data science and data engineering, with a strong enthusiasm for learning and applying these fields to real-world problems. He enjoys exploring new technologies and continuously expanding his skills in Python, SQL, machine learning, and cloud tools such as Terraform, AWS, and Docker. Driven by curiosity, he focuses on building scalable data solutions and transforming complex challenges into meaningful insights.

Bachelor in Statistics from UFRJ

Certificates

Airflow, DBT & Astro Workshop - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

This workshop covered advanced data engineering tools, focusing on workflow orchestration with Apache Airflow, data transformation with DBT, and cloud deployment using Astro.

Key Technologies: Airflow, DBT, Astro, Python, SQL, Data Engineering.

Airflow Workshop - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

Focused on mastering Apache Airflow for workflow orchestration. Covered creating DAGs, scheduling tasks, and building robust data pipelines using Python.

Key Technologies: Apache Airflow, Python, DAGs, Workflow Orchestration.

AWS Cloud Bootcamp Certification - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

An intensive bootcamp focused on building data engineering and analytics solutions on AWS. Gained hands-on experience with core services for data pipelines, cloud storage (S3), data processing, and serverless architectures, aligning with AWS Well-Architected principles.

Key Technologies: AWS, EC2, S3, Lambda, Cloud Computing, Infrastructure as Code.

DBT Bootcamp Certification - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

Certified in dbt, covering both dbt Core for development and dbt Cloud for orchestration. Built modular data models, implemented dbt tests for data quality, created snapshots for historical tracking, and wrote macros using Jinja for reusable logic. Applied analytics engineering best practices to build reliable, documented data pipelines.

Key Technologies: DBT, SQL, Data Transformation, Analytics Engineering.

Docker Workshop - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

Comprehensive workshop on Docker containerization. Learned to create and manage container images, use Docker Compose for multi-container applications, and deploy applications in isolated environments.

Key Technologies: Docker, Containerization, Images, Docker Compose.

Git & GitHub Certification - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

This certification covers the fundamentals and advanced practices of Git and GitHub, including version control, branching strategies, repository management, collaboration workflows, pull requests, code reviews, and GitHub features such as Issues, Projects, and Actions. The course provided hands-on experience with real-world workflows, enabling efficient source code management and team collaboration.

Key Technologies: Git, GitHub, Version Control, Collaboration, Branching, Pipelines.

Python Bootcamp Certification - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

Intensive Python bootcamp covering error handling, control flow, core data types (lists, dictionaries, dataframes), functions, data structures, and OOP (classes, inheritance, polymorphism). Included backend development with SQLModel, SQLAlchemy, Pydantic, APIs, Requests, and CRUD operations, ending with a full project integrating backend, frontend, and a relational database.

Key Technologies: Web Scraping, REST APIs, ETL, Git, Python, JSON, Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), CRUD, Data Engineering.

SQL Bootcamp Certification - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

Completed an Intensive SQL Bootcamp focused on advanced querying and database development. Covered JOINs, CTEs, subqueries, window functions, views, temporary and materialized tables, stored procedures, functions, triggers, ACID transactions, indexing, execution order, optimization, B-trees, and partitioning.

Key Technologies: Views, Window Functions, Stored Procedures, RDBMS, CTE, Database Triggers, ETL, Git, Materialized Views, Database Design, SQL, MySQL, CRUD, Data Engineering.

BairesDev - Machine Learning Practitioner

Download Certificate

Comprehensive bootcamp on machine learning practices, covering recommender systems, deep learning with convolutional neural networks, natural language processing, and neural network architectures. Focused on practical implementation using Python and version control with Git.

Key Technologies: Recommender Systems, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Machine Learning, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), Git, Neural Networks, Python.

Date Extraction PDF Regex Workshop - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

Workshop focused on extracting structured data from PDF documents using regular expressions. Covered techniques for parsing unstructured text, pattern matching, and automating data extraction workflows from various document formats.

Key Technologies: Regular Expressions (Regex), PDF Processing, Data Extraction, Text Parsing, Python, Document Automation.

Event-Driven Architecture with Amazon SQS & Lambda - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

Workshop on building event-driven systems using AWS services. Covered message queuing with Amazon SQS, serverless computing with AWS Lambda, and designing scalable, decoupled architectures for real-time data processing.

Key Technologies: AWS SQS, AWS Lambda, Event-Driven Architecture, Serverless Computing, Cloud Messaging, AWS Cloud, Microservices.

Infrastructure as Code with Terraform - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

Comprehensive workshop on Infrastructure as Code using Terraform. Covered declarative infrastructure management, cloud resource provisioning, state management, and best practices for maintaining scalable and reproducible infrastructure deployments.

Key Technologies: Terraform, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), Cloud Provisioning, DevOps, AWS, State Management, Configuration Management.

Streaming Architecture with Kafka - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

Workshop focused on building real-time data streaming architectures using Apache Kafka. Covered message brokers, stream processing, data pipelines, and designing systems for high-throughput, low-latency data processing.

Key Technologies: Apache Kafka, Stream Processing, Message Brokers, Real-time Data, Data Pipelines, Event Streaming, Distributed Systems.

Web Scraping, Redis & MongoDB Workshop - Jornada de Dados

Download Certificate

Hands-on workshop covering web scraping techniques, data caching with Redis, and NoSQL database management with MongoDB. Focused on building complete data collection and storage pipelines with modern database technologies.

Key Technologies: Web Scraping, Redis, MongoDB, NoSQL, Data Collection, Caching, Python, Database Management.
